query: "gas prices" OR "gasoline prices" OR "oil prices" OR petrol

articles.title: Same-sex marriage isn’t the reason that gas prices are high
articles.description: This Pride month, Republicans are again looking for culture war scapegoats instead of policies that improve American lives.

articles.title: India can grow over 8% despite oil shocks, crude impact overblown in narrative: World Bank exec
articles.description: India's economy shows strong growth, defying fears of oil price shocks. Neelkanth Mishra, World Bank Executive Director, states India is well-positioned to handle higher oil prices. Domestic demand remains robust, with positive indicators in car sales and mall footfalls. India's refining capabilities offer a buffer, mitigating the impact of crude price increases. Growth is projected to remain strong, near 7.5-8%.

articles.title: New car tax bands confirmed - most petrol and diesel driver affected
articles.description: Petrol and diesel owners are being slapped with new car tax charges as new rates come into effect.

articles.title: Ultraviolette Launches 'Kill The Petrol Bill' Programme; Offers Up To Rs 30,000 Cashback - Details
articles.description: Ultraviolette has launched the Kill The Petrol Bill' programme, offering cashback of up to Rs 30,000 to customers switching from petrol bikes.

articles.title: Domestic LPG prices raised by Rs 29 per cylinder, second hike amid West Asia conflict
articles.description: The LPG price increase comes amid a broader rise in fuel prices across the country. Petrol and diesel prices have been increased by a cumulative Rs 7.50 per litre since mid-May, while CNG rates have risen by around Rs 6 per kg during the same period.

articles.title: Indian households continue to pay among the lowest cooking gas prices in the world: Petroleum Ministry
articles.description: The Indian household continues to buy cooking gas much cheaper than the household in any neighbouring country, and far below the price paid in advanced economies such as the United States, Australia and Canada, the Ministry of Petroleum and Natural Gas said on Sunday, noting that a beneficiary of the Pradhan Mantri Ujjwala Yojana (PMUY) pays an effective Rs 642 for a 14.2 kg cylinder, and the general consumer in Delhi Rs 942, against a cost to supply that has now risen to over Rs 1,600.

articles.title: 'India's Cooking Gas Prices Remain Lowest in the World': Petroleum Ministry Amid LPG Hike
articles.description: India News: Despite a Rs 29 increase in domestic LPG prices, India's cooking gas costs remain among the lowest globally. The Petroleum Ministry reveals that household subsidies help maintain affordability, even as international prices soar due to the West Asia crisis.

articles.title: Indian Households Continue to Pay Among the Lowest Cooking Gas Prices in the World: Petroleum Ministry
articles.description: Domestic LPG prices have been increased by Rs 29 per cylinder from Sunday amid the rise in cost due to the West Asia crisis.

articles.title: Petrol, Diesel prices today, June 7: Check prices in Delhi, Mumbai, Kolkata, Chennai, Hyderabad
articles.description: In Delhi, petrol has crossed ₹100 per litre, while diesel is priced at ₹95.20 per litre.

articles.title: FIIs, weak global cues among 5 factors that could keep D-St under pressure this week
articles.description: Indian stock markets may remain under pressure this week amid persistent FII selling, weak global cues, rising geopolitical tensions in West Asia and elevated crude oil prices. While RBIs policy measures and steps to attract foreign capital could support sentiment, investors will closely track monsoon progress, inflation concerns, global market trends and institutional flows for further market direction.
